zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏弱
zh.content:
当前雪崩币(AVAX/USD)价格位于 $9.2969$，较日内高低点波动有限，显示市场短期多空力量处于均衡状态。价格低于20日均线SMA(20) $9.3426$，暗示整体短期趋势偏弱，但跌幅有限，呈现震荡整理格局。

MACD指标显示主线为 $0.0264$，虽然信号线未提供，但主线正值意味着仍存在一定多头动能。不过，RSI缺失，无法判断超买超卖情况，因此当前技术指标提示投资者应保持谨慎，关注后续动能变化。

支撑位初步关注 $9.26$ 附近的日内低点，以及心理整数位 $9.20$，若跌破可能触发进一步回调。阻力位在 $9.34$ SMA附近及 $9.36$ 前期高点，若突破将有助于确认短期反弹。

交易策略上，建议短线投资者保持低仓位，逢低可尝试小额做多，止损设置于支撑下方0.5%-1%区间；激进者可关注阻力突破后的顺势加仓机会。整体来看，市场短期震荡偏弱，中期需等待价格稳定回到均线之上以确认上行趋势。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Avalanche continues to trade in a narrow consolidation range near 9.30, reflecting weak short-term momentum after recent selling pressure across the broader crypto market. Price action remains slightly below the 20-day simple moving average at 9.34, suggesting bears still hold a mild technical advantage. The tight daily range between 9.26 and 9.31 indicates indecision, with traders waiting for stronger directional catalysts before committing to larger positions. Momentum currently favors sideways-to-bearish conditions unless AVAX can reclaim higher resistance zones.

The MACD reading remains positive at 0.026, which hints that downside momentum may be slowing despite the lack of a confirmed bullish crossover signal. However, the absence of a reliable RSI reading limits confirmation of oversold or overbought conditions. With price hovering under the SMA(20), the market still appears vulnerable to rejection on rallies. If AVAX fails to sustain support above 9.25, bearish pressure could intensify and expose lower retracement levels in the near term.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located near 9.26, followed by a stronger demand zone around 9.10. On the upside, resistance is developing near 9.34, aligning with the 20-day moving average, while a breakout above 9.40 could improve sentiment and open the path toward the 9.70 region. Volume expansion near either boundary would likely determine the next decisive directional move. Until then, volatility may remain compressed with limited follow-through.

Short-term traders may prefer a cautious range-trading strategy while price remains trapped between support and resistance. Buying near 9.25 with tight risk controls could offer favorable short-term opportunities if support continues to hold. More conservative participants may wait for a confirmed close above 9.34 before considering bullish continuation setups. Conversely, a breakdown below 9.25 would weaken market structure and could trigger additional downside momentum, making defensive positioning increasingly important.
